description: HOOD IUVKR GLACIER THURSDAY JANUARY 27 1921 ODELL After having spent the late fall and until the middle of January visiting relatives in California Mr and Mrs Dane Kemp and children returned home last week They report that Mr mid Mr i E Bowerman and daugh ter Irma who motored to Whittier California expect to return home soon Thos Iacey who will have charge of local road crews for the ensuing season has done such work as weather conditions permit in order that mads may be improved at earliest date pos sible J H Ejrgert went to Portland Thureday lor a combined business and pleasure trip He returned home Mon day Chas Davis has gone to California for a visit with relatives Mrs Davis spent some time visiting at the home of her son Noel Davis who is now lo cated at Grants Pass Ore She too is how in California Mr and Mrs Geo Sheppard went to Portland Saturday to attend the Shrine Ceremonial and Daughters of the Nile Mr and Mrs A B Shelley of The Dalles were also attendants at the above mentioned Mdsonic affairs While the parents were in Portland their children visited at the home
